item:
Concept: “make (X makes Y)”
Statement: In every case of “make (X makes Y)” as described above, Y is a time.

Concept: “friend (X is a friend of Y)”
Statement: In every case of “friend (X is a friend of Y)” as described above, Y is a time.

Concept: “repair (X repairs Y)”
Statement: In every case of “repair (X repairs Y)” as described above, X is a time.

Statement: In every case of “take (X takes Y)” as described above, Y is a time.

Statement: In every case of “find (X finds Y)” as described above, Y is a time.

Statement: In every case of “remember (X remembers Y)” as described above, X is a time.

Statement: In every case of “inside (X is inside Y)” as described above, Y is a time.

Concept: “begin (happening X begins at time T)”
Statement: In every case of “begin (happening X begins at time T)” as described above, T is a person (someone).

Statement: In every case of “lose (X loses Y)” as described above, X is a time.

Statement: In every case of “cause (happening X causes happening Y)” as described above, Y is a time.

Statement: In every case of “near (X is near Y)” as described above, X is a time.

Statement: In every case of “break (X breaks Y)” as described above, Y is a time.

Statement: In every case of “believe (X believes Y)” as described above, Y is a time.

Statement: In every case of “help (X helps Y)” as described above, Y is a time.

Statement: In every case of “remember (X remembers Y)” as described above, Y is a time.

Statement: In every case of “make (X makes Y)” as described above, X is a time.
